title: 1981-04-16_Pat_114.txt
key_claims: Superimposing World A and World B yields the hyper-field AB. It is only in this complete, combined matrix that the divine (Christ/Valis) stands out and becomes palpable.
Gnosticism functions on a 180° reversal of sign-values: the ostensible official world is a fraud designed to keep us in thrall. The true story is the exact opposite of what the Empire presents.
*VALIS* the novel is not merely *about* Gnosticism; it *is* an instance of Gnostic revelation.
The presence of Zebra (the concealed messenger/Jesus patibilis) in the novel makes it fundamentally authentic and optimistic, representing soteriology (rescue) actively occurring within the prison.
recurring_concepts: **Ditheon vs. The Macro-World**: Just as joining two human psyches creates Ditheon, joining the two companion mundane worlds creates a cosmic hyper-field pervaded by God.
reading_excerpt: Superimposing World A and World B yields the hyper-field AB. It is only in this complete, combined matrix that the divine (Christ/Valis) stands out and becomes palpable.
